/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/bhrt-diagram.dir/bhrt_diagram.cpp.o" -o bhrt-diagram   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/usr/local/cuda-13.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib libbhrt_core.a /usr/local/lib/libregina-engine.so -lgmp -lgmpxx -lgmp -lgmpxx /usr/local/cuda-13.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
